scope: Thompson kernel warmed timing on real WRF-oracle d02 grid, tiled 4x to 20748 columns (above host-timer floor); median of 120 reps

sed_vs_sourcesink_decomposition_5187col.note: sedimentation is ~85% of the kernel and is launch/bandwidth-bound (64 sequential substeps x 4 species); fp32 gives ~1.0x, structural unroll ~1.1x

verdicts.fp32_microphysics: DEAD END for speed (~1.0x): Thompson is launch/bandwidth-bound, NOT fp64-compute-bound. fp32 work-dtype kept as gated opt-in (default OFF), oracle-faithful (<=fp32 storage precision).
verdicts.batched_4species_scan: REGRESSION - serialises what XLA parallelises; rejected.
verdicts.implicit_backward_euler_sed: ~2.4x on the kernel BUT it is an algorithm change (more diffusive vertical profile; precip+column-mass conserved to ~1%). NOT shipped - requires precipitating WRF oracle + 6-24h coupled skill validation (GPT-5.5 concurs). Manager-gated scheme change / ADR.
